why.title1: Why do we keep becoming turtles
why.desc: No time or budget for hospital visits, yet you feel your body deteriorating the more you ignore it. For busy PC power users who sit for long hours in modern society — Posture Turtle is the service for you!

posture.title: Posture Analysis
posture.desc: Analyze your posture in real-time via webcam anytime, anywhere, without switching windows or disrupting your work.

widget.title: Real-time Widget Feedback
widget.desc: A small widget with a giraffe and turtle provides real-time posture feedback. You can adjust the size and position as you like.

dashboard.title: Data Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Experience voluntary and lasting change through weekly and monthly personalized statistics and pattern analysis.

alert.title: Smart Alerts
alert.desc: Accurately catches moments when your posture gets too bad or stretching is needed and notifies you smartly.

q1.question: I'm concerned about security and privacy with webcam usage. Is it safe?
q1.answer: Posture Turtle prioritizes user privacy above all. All video analysis is processed 100% on-device, meaning it stays on your PC. Recorded footage is never sent to external servers and is discarded immediately after analysis, so you can use it with peace of mind.

q2.question: Can I use it without a webcam?
q2.answer: No, Posture Turtle uses a webcam to analyze your real-time posture in 3D, so a camera device is essential. Unfortunately, if your PC doesn't have a connected camera, you won't be able to use the service at this time.

q3.question: Does it work well regardless of laptop or desktop specs?
q3.answer: Posture Turtle is optimized to run on low resources, so it works smoothly on standard office laptops and desktops. As long as you have a standard webcam, you can use the 3D posture analysis feature right away without additional equipment.

q4.question: I use dual monitors. Does it matter which one I look at?
q4.answer: Posture Turtle is designed to analyze posture based on the front-facing webcam. For the most accurate measurements, we recommend placing the webcam directly in front of you. If you're looking at a monitor from the side, it may detect poor posture, so please place the camera at the top center of your main monitor.

q5.question: Can I use it on a tablet or smartphone?
q5.answer: Currently, Posture Turtle is only available on PC. We're considering mobile support in the future.

q6.question: What should I do when I step away briefly?
q6.answer: When stepping away briefly, you can pause Posture Turtle or cover your webcam. If you'll be away for a long time, we recommend closing the app.

q7.question: What if my posture doesn't improve or the pain persists despite using Posture Turtle?
q7.answer: If pain persists or symptoms worsen, we recommend consulting a medical professional. Posture Turtle is a service that helps build posture correction habits and does not replace medical diagnosis.
